title: Catalog of Open Infrastructure Services (COIs): Overview, recent work, and next steps
author: Richard Dunks
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Slides from an October 2022 presentation on IOI's  Catalog of Open Infrastructure Services (COIs)  at the  IOI Funders Summit   by Richard Dunks and Taimour Azizuddin from Invest in Open Infrastructure. 

 Video recording:  https://youtu.be/SLI5KPW1q_E . 

 More information about the Summit:  https://hackmd.io/@investinopen/Funders-Summit-2022
